title: Lake, Hills & Ganga Retreat
description: A refined multi-mood itinerary featuring lakeside calm, classic hill-station charm and the spiritual softness of Rishikesh. It suits guests who want photogenic landscapes, gentle pace and a premium balance between leisure and spirituality.
hotelType: Premium stays in lake, hill and riverfront destinations
transport: Private cab for the complete route
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Nainital and relaxed lakefront evening.
Day 2: Nainital sightseeing with viewpoints and local market.
Day 3: Transfer to Mussoorie with scenic breakpoints.
Day 4: Mussoorie local exploration and leisure hours.
Day 5: Drive to Rishikesh, check-in and evening ghat experience.
Day 6: Morning sightseeing and departure.

title: Kumaon Wilderness & Mussoorie Escape
description: A smartly crafted route linking the softness of Nainital, the wild edge of Corbett and the timeless hill appeal of Mussoorie. Great for guests who enjoy variety—lakes, forest ambience and hill-station comfort in one polished journey.
hotelType: Premium stays with lake, forest and hill ambience
transport: Private cab for all transfers and local routes
inclusions: 🌲 Forest-side leisure and optional safari guidance
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Nainital and evening by the lake.
Day 2: Nainital sightseeing and leisure shopping.
Day 3: Proceed to Jim Corbett and relax at the resort.
Day 4: Optional safari support and onward drive to Mussoorie.
Day 5: Mussoorie local sightseeing with free evening.
Day 6: Departure after breakfast.

title: Kainchi Dham Blessings & Wild Trail
location: Nainital (Kainchi Dham) • Almora • Jim Corbett • Haridwar • Rishikesh
description: A spiritually enriched Uttarakhand route connecting Kainchi Dham, serene Kumaon landscapes, Jim Corbett’s forest calm and the sacred river energy of Haridwar-Rishikesh. This package is ideal for travellers seeking blessings, scenic travel and clean route management.
hotelType: Comfort and premium stays across temple, hill and river towns
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Nainital and evening acclimatisation.
Day 2: Visit Kainchi Dham and continue towards Almora.
Day 3: Almora ridge-town sightseeing and transfer to Jim Corbett.
Day 4: Leisure resort morning and proceed towards Haridwar.
Day 5: Haridwar spiritual circuit and evening Ganga Aarti.
Day 6: Rishikesh sightseeing, ghats and iconic suspension bridge zone.
Day 7: Departure after breakfast.

title: Naini Lake & Corbett Wilderness Break
description: A short yet polished holiday built for guests who want a refreshing mix of lakeside beauty and forest-resort downtime. This compact package works especially well for quick family breaks and couples seeking an easy Uttarakhand getaway.
hotelType: Comfort lake and jungle resort stays
transport: Private cab from pickup to drop
inclusions: 🌅 Nainital viewpoints and leisure stop support
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival in Nainital and leisure check-in.
Day 2: Nainital local sightseeing and market time.
Day 3: Transfer to Jim Corbett and resort leisure.
Day 4: Optional safari assistance and relaxed forest-side day.
Day 5: Departure after breakfast.

title: Kedarnath Shakti Darshan Retreat
description: A spiritually focused Kedarnath itinerary arranged with smooth route handling, premium stays where available and a calm darshan rhythm. Designed for devotees who want comfort, coordination and a less stressful Himalayan pilgrimage movement.
hotelType: Comfort mountain stays with pilgrimage support
inclusions: 🧭 On-ground support for key movement points
exclusions: 🌧️ Any cost due to weather / road closure
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival at base city, briefing and stay.
Day 2: Begin onward journey towards Kedarnath sector with scenic route support.
Day 3: Darshan assistance and return movement planning.
Day 4: Departure after breakfast.

title: Badrinath Sacred Valley Sojourn
description: A premium Badrinath route through the high Himalayan valley, built for devotees seeking a serene temple visit with smooth transport planning and comfortable overnight halts.
hotelType: Comfort stays with scenic valley halts
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival and transfer into the valley sector.
Day 2: Badrinath darshan and nearby sacred points.
Day 3: Scenic return route with river confluence stopovers.
Day 4: Departure after breakfast.

title: Char Dham Himalayan Pilgrimage
description: A complete Himalayan dharmic journey designed for families and serious devotees who want all four dhams completed with clear logistics, clean stays and premium route support.
hotelType: Premium mountain hotels and pilgrim stays
inclusions: 🛕 Darshan movement support across all dhams
🌄 Scenic halt planning through the Himalayas
exclusions: 🎫 VIP darshan, ritual and ticket costs
🌧️ Cost due to weather delays or landslides
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival and briefing in Haridwar / Dehradun sector.
Day 2-3: Yamunotri route and darshan movement.
Day 4-5: Gangotri sector pilgrimage.
Day 6-7: Kedarnath route, stay and darshan support.
Day 8-9: Badrinath sector with sacred stopovers.
Day 10: Return and departure.
